system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Athletics TN 6
Type: Counter
Qi: 1

You unfurl your robe, a piece of fabric or even bits of stone and dirt to create a glorious protective canopy against incoming attacks. On a success the canopy protects against projectiles in an area before you (20 feet per Rank of Waijia), reducing Damage dice of such attacks by 1d10 per Rank of Qi. Cathartic: You expand the canopy, inflating it with Qi and causing the accumulated projectiles (all the projectiles that have hit the canopy) to rebound back at the attackers. You can direct each projectile at a single target of your choice, each doing 1d10 Damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: You expand the canopy, inflating it with Qi and causing the accumulated projectiles (all the projectiles that have hit the canopy) to rebound back at the attackers. You can direct each projectile at a single target of your choice, each doing 1d10 Damage.
